title: Earnings call transcript: SoundHound AI Q1 2026 beats EPS forecast
text: SoundHound AI's Q1 2026 earnings call showed the company beat EPS forecasts despite challenging profitability metrics. Revenue of $44.2 million exceeded expectations with 52% year-over-year growth. The company reported GAAP loss of $0.11 per share, slightly worse than the anticipated $0.10 loss, but still represented strong earnings per share relative to analyst expectations. Core automotive and IoT segments showed 88% organic growth excluding acquisitions, demonstrating robust underlying business momentum. Management launched OASYS, an orchestrated agentic AI platform designed to streamline AI deployment processes. The LivePerson acquisition was a major discussion point, with management explaining the strategic rationale for combining voice and digital messaging capabilities. The company maintained 2026 revenue guidance of $225-260 million and provided 2027 guidance of $350-400 million including LivePerson contribution. Strong cash position of $216 million with zero debt provides financial flexibility.
